# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker/whalesay:latest as builder

FROM ubuntu:20.04

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y nginx python3-pip redis-server postgresql postgresql-client libpq-dev

# Create directories for services
RUN mkdir /app/{web,api,database,redis}

# Copy service files
COPY web/app.py /app/web/app.py
COPY api/app.py /app/api/app.py
COPY database/db.sql /app/database/db.sql
COPY redis/redis.conf /app/redis/redis.conf

# Install Python dependencies
WORKDIR /app/api
RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt

# Initialize database
WORKDIR /app/database
RUN createdb mydatabase && \
    psql -f db.sql

# Start services using supervisord
COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord"]
